name: Wang Lin/Items | Xian Ni Wikia - Fandom
snippet:
Wang Lin.
Wang Lin used it to complete his slaughter essence. [1] Took from a Scattered Devil while he was in the Demon Spirit Land. In the Cloud Sea Star System it is a exclusive armour of the God Sect known as the Divine Devil Armour. It is a Origin Soul defensive treasure made from the skin of a 8-star Anceint God.
